name: 3M™ Thermal Transfer Label Material 76999, Matte White Acrylate, Roll, Config
short_description: 3M™ Thermal Transfer Label Materials are versatile and durable label stocks. They provide excellent thermal stability and moisture resistance for use in demanding applications, such as bar code tracking. The adhesive on many labels offers excellent clarity and good initial tack to help improve the finished label.
benefits: Offers excellent thermal stability and moisture resistance
Versatile materials produced for use in a variety of applications
Adhesive offers excellent clarity and good initial tack to help improve finished label

discovery.title: 3M™ Thermal Transfer Label Material 76999, Matte White Acrylate, Roll, Config
